ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the exchange */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for accessing the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the exchange currently active? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "block_time" INTEGER /* Average block time of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "base_crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base cryptocurrency */,
  "quote_crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the pair is listed */,
  "min_order_size" REAL /* Minimum order size for the trading pair */,
  "max_order_size" REAL /* Maximum order size for the trading pair */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee for trading the pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_quote_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_base_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the time interval */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the time interval */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price at the start of the time interval */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price at the end of the time interval */,
  "volume_from" REAL /* Volume traded in the base cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_to" REAL /* Volume traded in the quote cryptocurrency */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., multiply, divide) */,
  "conversion_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for conversion */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price during the time interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Is the user's account verified? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Is this the default role for new users? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_market_data, trade) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Is the permission enabled? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used by the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the session currently active? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the base cryptocurrency traded */,
  "total" REAL /* Total value of the trade in the quote cryptocurrency */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee for the trade */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fee is paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order is set */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the base cryptocurrency ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, filled, canceled) */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Is the order hidden from the order book? */,
  "post_only" INTEGER /* Is the order a post-only order? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the base cryptocurrency traded */,
  "total" REAL /* Total value of the trade in the quote cryptocurrency */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee for the trade */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fee is paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the wallet */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the wallet */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the cryptocurrency in the wallet */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the wallet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "sender_wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender's wallet */,
  "receiver_wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver's wallet */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being transferred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cryptocurrency transferred */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction occurred */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee for the transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number in which the transaction was included */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_sender_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_receiver_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full article */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., market, technology, regulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, inflation, unemployment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification_email, dark_mode) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Is this the default setting for new users? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the query */,
  "query_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was performed */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* Search string used in the query */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the query */,
  "is_saved" INTEGER /* Is the query saved for future reference? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
